privileged_info_summary: The log-linear regression model on the TitanicSurvival dataset with main effects and two-way interactions for 'survived', 'sex', and 'passengerClass' yields a Deviance (G²) of 47.17, 2 Degrees of Freedom (DF), and a p-value of <0.0001 (approx 5.71e-11). Because the p-value is <= 0.05, the conclusion is 'INADEQUATE', indicating the model with only two-way interactions does not fit the data adequately and requires a 3-way interaction.
